snippet.title: Back in the Mountains - 100 Mile Ultramarathon Training Vlog - Lakeland 100 & Lakeland 50
snippet.description:
100 Mile Ultramarathon Training Vlog - Week 4 - Lakeland 100 & Lakeland 50 Ultra Trail Marathon

I enjoyed this week. It's been so long since we had a trip to the Lakes. We all had a great time exploring the trails and the motto for the day was stay high and straight line! We didn't summit Helveylln, but we still got a taste of how awful the weather can be at times. Looking forward to the next trip already.

Start - 00:00:00
Interval Session - 00:03:50
Trip to the Lakes - 00:08:15

'The Lakeland 100 ‘Ultra Tour of the Lake District’ is the most spectacular long distance trail race which has ever taken place within the UK. The circular route encompasses the whole of the lakeland fells, includes in the region of 6300m of ascent and consists almost entirely of public bridleways and footpaths. The route starts in Coniston and heads South before completing a clockwise loop which takes in the Dunnerdale fells, Eskdale, Wasdale and Buttermere before arriving in Keswick. From here the route heads to Matterdale and continues over to Haweswater before returning via Kentmere, Ambleside and Elterwater to the finish at Coniston.'

If you like Ben Parkes, Run4Adventure, The Ginger Runner, Seth James Demoor and Vo2MaxProductions then you might like this upload too.
